charaepi_ch0360_00_kakitsubata/2301_1101:
At Drayton’s invitation,
[Name:PlayerNickname ] made [EN:Gen Ref="255" M="his" F="her" ] way
over to a glacier.
charaepi_ch0360_00_kakitsubata/2301_1201: Heh heh! You made it!
As I figured, we’re the only ones here.
With nobody else around, we can just chill!

Sorry for inviting you here out of the blue,
buddy.

When I’m in town, I always run into people
I know, and they start getting naggy.
Makes it hard to take it easy, y’know?

Getting pestered about school and homework
and all that... It’s annoying.

That’s why I invited you all the way here,
where nobody else would be.
I know you won’t nag, at least. Right?

By the way, you cool with cold weather,
bud?
You are? Good to know.

I’m a cold-weather kinda guy. You wouldn’t
expect that from a Dragon-type user, huh?
Heh heh. He’s the same.

Archaludon and I had a lot of fun together
in Blueberry Academy’s League Club.

Believe it or not, we were once the strongest
pair there!
charaepi_ch0360_00_kakitsubata/2301_0301:
Are you aiming to be number one
on Pasio?
charaepi_ch0360_00_kakitsubata/2301_0401: You kill me with your jokes, bud!
charaepi_ch0360_00_kakitsubata/2301_0302: Are you not gonna aim higher here?
charaepi_ch0360_00_kakitsubata/2301_0402:
By “higher,” you mean be the very best and
aim for the top? Nah.
charaepi_ch0360_00_kakitsubata/2301_1201:
Everyone at Blueberry Academy was strong,
sure...

But becoming number one on this island?
That’s a whole nother level.

We’re just gonna chill out and have some
fun. That’s all we need.
We’ll take it easy.

If we do what we like and focus on having
fun battles, eventually we’ll get stronger!

Doesn’t life have room for taking a stroll on
the scenic path sometimes?

So...let’s set aside all this talk about battling
and getting stronger.

Do you know any secret hideouts where we
can slack off?

Next time, let’s go on another fun outing—
just us two!
